description: Major Hellgate matchmaking and balance updates, Faction Warfare progression changes, chat command updates, and combat adjustments.

sections.heading: Hellgate Changes
sections.description: Matchmaking, IP scaling, rewards, and mob balance updates.
items: Reduced matchmaking selectivity for 10v10 Hellgates
Improved matchmaking chaining across all Hellgate types
10v10 Lethal Hellgate IP requirement reduced from 1100 to 1000
IP softcap reduced from 1300 to 1200
IP multiplier above softcap reduced from 0.5 to 0.35
Hellgate mob HP and damage reduced by ~20%
Demonic Predator auto attack damage reduced by ~31%
Demonic Berserker Raging Onslaught damage reduced by ~37%
Added Fame rewards to PvP reward chests, scaling with bonuses but not Infamy
Adjusted loot tables for 5v5 and 10v10 Lethal Hellgates
Fixed Infamy bonus display and effectiveness issues
sections.searchable_text: hellgate matchmaking ip softcap infamy fame loot mobs balance

sections.heading: Updated Guild/Party Chat Commands
sections.description: Changes to command structure and new party commands.
items: Guild invite command changed to /ginvite
Guild kick command changed to /gkick
New party invite command /invite
New party kick command /kick
New leave party command /leave
Chat notifications added for party invite responses
sections.searchable_text: chat commands guild party invite kick leave notification

sections.heading: Faction Warfare Changes
sections.description: Progression, UI feedback, and boss adjustments.
items: Added milestone popup notifications during campaigns
Outpost alert status escalates after boss damage
Champion of Lymhurst cooldowns reduced (Barbed Arrow, Multishot)
Champion of Thetford Meteor cooldown increased
Faction rank bonuses now scale earlier and more smoothly
High ranks (18-21) slightly reduced bonuses
sections.searchable_text: faction warfare ranks bonuses outpost boss cooldown

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Reduced logout times in non-lethal dungeons (10s blue, 60s yellow)
Updated Hellgate loading screen
Mobile chat font size increased
sections.searchable_text: logout dungeon hellgate mobile chat font

changes.raw_text: Cooldown Reduction when healing an ally reduced; resistance buff removed
Now affects limited targets and interacts with diminishing returns
notes: Fear effect now properly uses Diminishing Returns

sections.heading: Fixes
sections.description: Bug fixes across systems and gameplay.
items: Fixed multiple Faction Warfare issues including logout timing and reward calculations
Outposts now ignore invulnerable players
Fixed Hellgates remaining on maps after exit
Corrected gathering gear buff display (5% instead of 2.5%)
Improved Corrupted Dungeon mob behavior
Fixed audio loop issue with Disembowel (Claws)
Mobile fixes for targeting and item dragging
Additional graphical, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes faction warfare hellgate map gathering buffs mobile audio ui
